description_long: This is a light tan, wide-brimmed hat with a smooth, slightly textured surface and a classic Western or cowboy style. The crown is tall and features a gentle pinch at the front, giving it a distinctive shape. The brim is broad, flat, and slightly upturned at the edges, providing ample shade and a bold silhouette. A thin, matching hatband encircles the base of the crown, tied simply at one side without any additional embellishments. The hat appears to be made from a woven material, likely felt or straw, and is designed for both sun protection and style. Its neutral color and minimalistic design make it suitable for urban and outdoor settings alike.
description: A light tan, wide-brimmed cowboy-style hat with a tall, pinched crown and a simple, thin hatband. The surface is smooth and slightly textured, with no visible decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall, pinched crown and wide, flat brim with a visible hatband tied on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rounded profile of the crown and the continuous, even width of the brim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the crown and the hatband knot positioned on the right side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the hatband knot more prominently visible and the smooth, unbroken brim.
attribute_brim_style: wide and flat with slightly upturned edges
attribute_crown_shape: tall with a gentle front pinch
